title: senecio jacottetianus
intro: Senecio jacottetianus, also known as Jerusalem Sage, is a perennial shrubby plant native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and polyacetylenes. The health benefits of Senecio jacottetianus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory issues. Senecio jacottetianus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although its use should be carefully considered due to potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
